title: Is Idolized by Millions
summary: You’re a celebrity and most people adore you.
tiers: Tier 3: Incredible Health or Skill With Attacks
Tier 5: Do You Know Who I Am?
Tier 6: Transcend the Script or Improved Companion
gm_intrusions: Fans are endangered or hurt on your behalf. Someone in your entourage betrays you. Your show, tour, contract, or other event is canceled. The media posts photos of you in an embarrassing situation.
text: You’re a celebrity and most people adore you.
